channel.title: Gradle on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Gradle on Make Things Happen

item.title: Publishing a private Android library
item.description: Recently I played around with a library that is used in multiple projects. This library has a huge list of dependencies like: coroutines, rxjava, navigation library from Google, material library, custom edit texts that come from 3rd party libraries and many more. Basically this library has also a rich set of screens available to the users that open given certain conditions. But our issues was bigger.

item.title: Creating a SonarQube custom plugin for Kotlin
item.description: In Android we decided that we want to implement a unit test performance monitor. The reason for it is that sometimes some unit tests would execute in more than 1 second and it was all because we would use the Schedulers.trampoline() RxJava scheduler instead of the TestScheduler which is part of the RX package.
